TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/241565. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 10 side b of tape (track 1-5): Christian songs to Aboriginal melodies, sung in the Atayal. The song titles are: 1) Rejoice; 2) Man Does Not Live by Bread Alone; 3) Let Us Have a Strong Faith; 4) When Jesus' Day Comes; 5) Let's Pray Fervently. Recorded in 1950s.
